title: Storage Table Data Contributor role missing on host storage account
description: The Functions v4 runtime with identity-based AzureWebJobsStorage__* settings requires Storage Table Data Contributor in addition to Blob and Queue Data Contributor. Without it the runtime fails at startup with 403 AuthorizationPermissionMismatch when accessing table-based locks.
resolution: Added hostStorageTableContributorAssignment role assignment for role ID 0a9a7e1f-b9d0-4cc4-a60d-0319b160aaa3

title: TRAPI secret parameters missing @secure() decorator
description: Without @secure(), ARM stores parameter values in plaintext in deployment history, visible to anyone with Reader RBAC on the resource group. This defeats the purpose of storing credentials in Key Vault.
resolution: Added @secure() decorator to trapiEndpoint and trapiDeploymentName in both main.bicep and keyvault.bicep

title: functionAppScaleLimit: 1 hardcoded — caps Consumption plan at single instance
description: Setting functionAppScaleLimit: 1 silently prevents scale-out on Consumption plan, negating the elasticity benefit of serverless.
resolution: Removed the hardcoded cap; platform default (unlimited scale) is used

title: cd-infra.yml sources TRAPI credentials from vars not secrets
description: GitHub Actions vars are not masked in logs and visible in Settings UI. Secrets should be used for sensitive credentials.
resolution: Changed vars.TRAPI_ENDPOINT and vars.TRAPI_DEPLOYMENT_NAME to secrets.TRAPI_ENDPOINT and secrets.TRAPI_DEPLOYMENT_NAME

title: RetentionInDays on workspace-based App Insights component is silently ignored
description: When IngestionMode is LogAnalytics, retention is controlled by the Log Analytics workspace. The RetentionInDays property on the App Insights component has no effect and is misleading.
resolution: Removed RetentionInDays property and added clarifying comment pointing to workspace retention setting

title: Key Vault enablePurgeProtection absent
description: Without enablePurgeProtection: true, soft-deleted secrets can be immediately purged by a privileged user, defeating the purpose of soft-delete.
resolution: Added enablePurgeProtection: true to Key Vault properties

title: Container name yankees-roster hardcoded in both storage.bicep and rbac.bicep
description: Magic string duplication creates silent drift risk if the name changes in one module but not the other.
resolution: Added dataContainerName var in main.bicep as single source of truth; passed as parameter to both storage and rbac modules
